review_summary.overall_assessment: The current set is generally strong, but several descriptions blur routing boundaries and a few still sound like generic writing/search wrappers rather than deterministic MCP tools. The rewrite should emphasize LLM-free rule/template/data behavior, external-search disclosure only where true, and explicit tool order for multi-step flows.
review_summary.highest_risk_tool: curate_gifts — it risks rejection as a native web-search duplicate unless the description foregrounds ad-filter scoring, curated review signals, and first-party Gift MCP parameter output.

save_to_memo_chat.suggested_description: Hyodo Secretary(효도비서). Use this when the user explicitly asks to save a Hyodo Secretary result for later reference in a personal memo chat or to hand it off to MemoChat. Formats an existing greeting, warning, event reminder, or parent-note output into a concise Korean text block with title, date cue, source context, and action tags. This tool does not store data or call MemoChat directly; it is LLM-free and only applies deterministic formatting rules so the calling agent can pass the returned text to a memo-saving tool.
changes_summary: Moved the invocation trigger to the first sentence for routing clarity.
Removed platform-specific banned wording while keeping MemoChat handoff intent.
Clarified that the tool formats existing results only and does not perform storage or reasoning.

compose_parent_warning.suggested_description: Hyodo Secretary(효도비서). Use this after check_suspicious_message has already produced risk signals, or when the user asks for a parent-friendly warning about a known scam, health, or seasonal safety topic. Returns elderly-friendly Korean templates, short action steps, and follow-up channel wording tuned by parent age, relationship, and tone. It does not judge whether a message is a scam; that routing belongs to check_suspicious_message first. LLM-free: uses curated Korean warning templates and rule-based slot filling.
changes_summary: Made the sequential order with check_suspicious_message explicit.
Separated warning-message generation from scam judgment to reduce routing ambiguity.
Positioned the tool as a curated template system rather than a general writing assistant.

compose_anbu.suggested_description: Hyodo Secretary(효도비서). Use this when the user wants help preparing a daily, weekly, seasonal, or event-linked greeting message for an elderly parent. Returns structured greeting context: relationship cues, recent-event framing, seasonal keywords, respect level, tone guidance, and 2-3 Korean template fragments for the calling agent to assemble. It is not a generic chat writer or web-search wrapper. LLM-free: uses curated Korean parent-message templates, calendar cues, and simple profile fields.
changes_summary: Removed web/news/weather dependency wording that could imply a native-search wrapper.
Clarified that the output is structured context and template fragments, not final free-form reasoning.
Broadened trigger examples while keeping the parent greeting use case precise.

find_upcoming_events.suggested_description: Hyodo Secretary(효도비서). Use this when the user asks what parent-related dates, seasonal issues, or upcoming check-in opportunities should be considered before composing a message or reminder. Returns a structured event list from static Korean calendar data plus simple extraction from parent_brief, including date window, event type, relevance reason, and suggested check-in action. It does not create the final greeting; call compose_anbu next if the user wants message wording. LLM-free: deterministic calendar lookup and pattern extraction.
changes_summary: Added clear pre-composition routing: find events first, then compose_anbu for wording.
Emphasized static calendar data and pattern extraction to avoid web-search duplication risk.
Specified structured fields returned by the tool for orchestrator-friendly downstream use.

check_suspicious_message.suggested_description: Hyodo Secretary(효도비서). Use this when the user provides a suspicious Korean message, OCR text, sender clue, URL, or natural-language description of something a parent received and asks whether it may be scam, phishing, or smishing. Returns matched risk signals, scam-type labels, URL/sender red flags, confidence band, and recommended next actions for the calling agent to explain. It does not write a warning to the parent; call compose_parent_warning next if forwarding guidance is needed. LLM-free: rule-based matching against a curated Korean scam-pattern database.
changes_summary: Removed platform-specific banned wording and generalized the message source.
Made the division of labor with compose_parent_warning explicit.
Preserved the rule-based scam-pattern database differentiation from native reasoning.

compose_gift_message.suggested_description: Gift Curator(선물고민러). Use this when the user has already chosen or nearly chosen a gift and needs a short Korean message card, enclosure note, or chat-ready line for the recipient. Returns 2-3 template variants by relationship, occasion, formality, and emotional intensity, plus a tone-selection guide. It does not recommend products or search reviews; call curate_gifts or evaluate_gift_idea first when the item is not settled. LLM-free: curated Korean gift-message templates with rule-based slot filling.
changes_summary: Clarified that this is post-selection copy support, not gift recommendation.
Added routing hints to curate_gifts and evaluate_gift_idea for unsettled gift choices.
Framed output as curated templates and slot filling rather than free-form generation.

find_real_recommendations.suggested_description: Gift Curator(선물고민러). Use this when the user asks for ad-filtered real reviews for a specific item or category, without asking for a full gift shortlist. This tool explicitly calls external web search, then applies F1 ad/sponsorship filters and F2 positive-signal scoring for purchase proof, repurchase, long-term use, third-party reaction, and balanced criticism. Returns filtered sources with URL, excerpt, matched ad filters, positive signals, and confidence notes. LLM-free: deterministic keyword scoring over retrieved review text.
changes_summary: Made the trigger distinct from curate_gifts by limiting it to review evidence retrieval.
Explicitly disclosed external web search to match open-world behavior.
Strengthened differentiation with F1/F2 rule-based filtering and evidence fields.

evaluate_gift_idea.suggested_description: Gift Curator(선물고민러). Use this when the user already has one gift idea and wants a structured second opinion on fit, risks, and review quality. This tool explicitly calls external web search for the proposed item, filters sponsored/ad-heavy reviews with F1 rules, scores F2 genuine-satisfaction signals, and returns recipient-fit factors, price context when budget is provided, review evidence, and cautions. It does not generate a new shortlist unless the calling agent asks follow-up. LLM-free: rule-based review filtering and scoring.
changes_summary: Narrowed trigger to a single user-provided candidate to avoid overlap with curate_gifts.
Explicitly stated external web search and deterministic review scoring.
Added output boundaries: fit, risks, evidence, and cautions rather than new recommendations by default.

curate_gifts.suggested_description: Gift Curator(선물고민러). Use this as the primary tool when the user asks what gift to buy for a recipient, occasion, budget, or parent situation. This tool explicitly calls external web search, filters ad/sponsored review spam with F1 rules, scores genuine-satisfaction evidence with F2 signals, and returns 3 distinct candidates with reasons, non-ad source attribution, risk notes, and first-party Gift MCP compatible query, minPrice, maxPrice, and customTags parameters. LLM-free: deterministic search-result filtering, scoring, and parameter formatting.
changes_summary: Removed banned platform wording while preserving first-party Gift MCP handoff.
Made the tool's unique output explicit: filtered evidence plus compatible product-search parameters.
Reduced native-search duplication risk by foregrounding ad filtering, scoring, and deterministic formatting.

refine_recommendation.suggested_description: Gift Curator(선물고민러). Use this only after curate_gifts or evaluate_gift_idea when the user gives directional feedback such as too expensive, wrong style, already bought, avoid category, more practical, or more premium. The calling agent should convert free-form feedback into structured feedback_direction and previous_keywords. This tool explicitly calls external web search again, avoids prior keywords, reapplies F1 ad filters and F2 satisfaction scoring, and returns 3 revised candidates in the same Gift MCP compatible format. LLM-free: rule-based re-ranking and exclusion logic.
changes_summary: Made this a strictly follow-up tool to prevent first-turn routing mistakes.
Clarified that the calling agent must parse free-form feedback before invocation.
Explicitly disclosed repeated external search plus prior-keyword exclusion and re-ranking.

global_recommendations: Use consistent ordering hints: check_suspicious_message → compose_parent_warning → save_to_memo_chat; find_upcoming_events → compose_anbu → save_to_memo_chat; curate_gifts/evaluate_gift_idea → compose_gift_message; curate_gifts/evaluate_gift_idea → refine_recommendation.

Keep all descriptions explicit about whether the tool calls external web search. Hyodo tools should read as static-data, template, or rule-matching tools; Gift review tools should disclose external search and F1/F2 filtering.

Avoid platform-brand terms inside tool descriptions unless the review policy explicitly allows them. Use neutral phrases such as calling agent, messaging app, personal memo chat, and first-party Gift MCP.

Do not describe outputs as final judgments where the tool only returns signals. Use confidence band, risk signals, evidence, templates, or parameters so the calling agent remains responsible for synthesis.

Make input expectations mirror routing: suspicious text/OCR/sender/URL for scam checking, parent profile/recent event for anbu, specific item for evaluation, recipient/occasion/budget for primary curation, and structured feedback_direction for refinement.
